docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIJKSTRA, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM (SC-100) - TO CHECK BOX IN ITEM 2: DEFENDANT IS ON ACTIVE MILITARY DUTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIJKSTRA, MARK
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 [AMENDED TO INDICATE DEFENDANT'S ACTIVE MILITARY DUTY STATUS] FILED BY DIJKSTRA, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIJKSTRA, MARK
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2022 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-22-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PALINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM TO NOV-07-2022 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MARK DIJKSTRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX ROLOFF IS PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCE. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT ALEX ROLOFF. DEFENDANT INFORMED CLERK'S OFFICE BEFORE THE HEARING THAT HE IS IN ACTIVE MILITARY STATIONED IN RI. CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM. PLAINTIFF DID NOT CHECK THE BOX ON CLAIM FORM ON PAGE TWO THAT THE DEFENDANT IS ACTIVE MILITARY WHICH IS REQUIRED. COURT GRANTS ZOOM APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT ALEX ROLOFF FOR TODAY'S PROCEEDING. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM(DEFENDANT)**GRANTED**

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-07-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-07-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF MARK DLJKSTRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEX ROLOFF IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ALEX ROLOFF ORALLY STIPULATE TO JUDGE PRO TEM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; DEPUTY NAZARUK; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,150.00 FILED BY DIJKSTRA, MARK AS TO DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-22-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIJKSTRA, MARK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROLOFF, ALEX $1,150.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,180.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
